title: crotalaria lotoides
intro: Crotalaria lotoides, also known as lotus crotalaria or hairy crotalaria, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria lotoides include its potential to treat fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria lotoides include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
